# ADR-2026-04-01-0001: Clean canonical ADR

**Status:** Accepted
**Date:** 2026-04-01
**Drivers:** Used as the negative-control fixture for `hex adr doctor` detectors. Every required field is present in canonical form and the lifecycle status classifies cleanly.

## Context

This file exists to anchor the test suite — every detector in `doctor.rs` runs on it and must return zero findings. If a future detector starts flagging it, either the fixture or the detector is wrong.

## Decision

Use canonical frontmatter: `**Status:** <single-keyword>` and `**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD`. Title H1 includes the same ADR ID as the filename.

## Consequences

- Regressions in any detector that produces a false positive on canonical input fail loudly.
- Any new detector added to the doctor must verify it returns clean against this fixture.
